top_signals.title: Starmer to leave Downing Street without ever managing to explain what he stood for
top_signals.summary: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer's stolid managerialism helped Labour woo a nation tired of Tory government, but it was out of step with the times in which he came to govern.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
